mapper.select: SELECT profile_id AS profileId, user_id AS userId, real_name AS realName, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, specialties, preferred_styles AS preferredStyles, preferred_categories AS preferredCategories, price_sensitivity AS priceSensitivity, location, company_name AS companyName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, bio, default_budget_min AS defaultBudgetMin, default_budget_max AS defaultBudgetMax, is_public AS isPublic, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM designer_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
